title: Monochrome: Only Colors That Look Monotonous
original_title: Monokrom: Hanya Warna Yang Terlihat Monoton
overview: Pelangi, a girl over 17 years old, turns out her life is monochrome, not as beautiful as her name. She has a friend named Dian who also brings a new person into Pelangi's life, namely Rey. One day, everything changed
